title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (j) UNDER 45, ROMBLON, PARAGRAPH (e), TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6619 / 53 OG No. 17, 5518 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1770, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (j) UNDER 45, ROMBLON, PARAGRAPH (e), TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1, Item (

j

) under 45, Romblon, paragraph (

e

), title B, section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred twenty is amended to read as follows:

"(

j

) Central School, Despujols ....................................... P 1,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
